category_title: Timid students who feel voiceless and isolated in peer work
minimal_context: Brandon is standing in front of his 6th-grade science class to deliver a lesson as a co-teacher.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Brandon, please stand in front of the class and deliver the science lesson from the lesson plan.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands in front of the class full of his peers) Okay...

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and teach them the science content.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Talking slow) Today... we are... going to...

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Very timid) I'm really nervous speaking in front of a class full of my peers. I'm talking slow... I usually feel like I have no voice because my partner doesn't like to talk to me.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Brandon, please stand in front of the class and deliver the science lesson from the lesson plan.

STUDENT: (Stands in front of the class full of his peers) Okay...

TUTOR: Go ahead and teach them the science content.

STUDENT: (Talking slow) Today... we are... going to...

TUTOR: Keep trying.

STUDENT: (Very timid) I'm really nervous speaking in front of a class full of my peers. I'm talking slow... I usually feel like I have no voice because my partner doesn't like to talk to me.

task.content: Standing in front of the 6th-grade science class to deliver a lesson as a co-teacher

context.social_setting: in front of a class full of his peers

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When in front his peers teaching science content
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: nervous speaking in front of a class full of his peers

behavior_patterns.condition: When teaching in front of the class
related_quotes: [co- teaching] helps me because when I was teaching in front of [of the class], because I was talking slow, and I got to stand in front of people and talk.
